{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017305734C3D5A8D373E49EEE8C"}"},"total":671},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7214727842901852965","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一本爽文！整体上非常不错，希望作者加快更新！越写越好！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1679809866,"group_id":"7126790241498696744","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8+mbvagz9ZTnpwT1r53r+0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"110482239962","user_name":"一眼万年"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110482239962","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7126790241498696744","book_info":{"abstract":"【虚拟网游+精准数据流+全宇宙+互通现实+无限等级】
凌羽退隐江湖后，以萌新玩家身份入驻了一款亿万星球玩家共玩的虚拟游戏，结果刚进游戏就疯狂掉级。
当别人努力为升到10级出村时，他已掉到了-10000级，似乎出村遥遥无期？
殊不知，全服倒数第一的他，即将成就全服1万级，10万级，乃至100万级的全服第一人称号；并一路问鼎蓝星第一人，银海系第一人，天域第一人，全宇宙第一人，乃至问鼎真正的巅峰。
【PS】
1：破防标准：攻击≥1.667倍防御
2：前100级野怪均为新手怪，破防后有额外暴击（暴击倍数为100除以野怪等级，反之玩家同理）
3：游戏难度极高，但每到一个特定等级，都可获得新玩法加持，以此大幅度提升实力。
4：无论自身属性多强，永远离不开装备加持，即装备特别特别特别重要。
5：简版公式：伤害=（攻击-防御*1.667）*1.5基础系数，实际公式因附带了等级抗性计算，使得基础系数有波动，但与简版悬殊不是特别大，另需注意前百级破防后有额外的暴击倍数）
6：游戏区域划分：联盟、村庄、城池、国度区、星球区、星系区、星域区、全服（即全宇宙）
7：致力塑造一部精准的数据流网游，所有数据均是精心计算（包括图片数据）。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/867d9121ba1fadb68bb1055dc4b507e7","author":"旗一诺","author_id":"","book_id":"7126790241498696744","book_name":"网游：制霸全服，成为宇宙之主","book_short_name":"制霸全服","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7126801865097871905","read_count":"17469","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2477499"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"1137","tags":"游戏体育,宠物,网游","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/46707db2357eebd6c815055c665c59e0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183057&x-signature=cjjvqcmsvijl7NJ8L3RsFiHlX%2B0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108630115874","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.7416175e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017305734C3D5A8D373E49EEE8C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读19小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1149,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":68564,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2513},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1681965867,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7362899035022443289","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"t
